strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning distributed systems, microservices, real-time data pipelines, and event-driven architecture across 17+ years
Current hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure including MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq

Demonstrated fintech adjacency through roles at RIDE Capital (investment platform) and Optilyz (pricing optimization), plus high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second
concerns: No evidence of people management, engineering org leadership, or team scaling — the resume is entirely individual-contributor throughout; the role requires scaling teams from 10 to 30+ and building a senior technical leadership layer

AI agent production experience is nascent (current role only, less than two years) and framed around tooling/developer infrastructure rather than operating stateful multi-agent systems with financial or regulatory consequences
Zero fintech infrastructure depth in credit systems, payment flows, real-time risk modeling, or compliance across jurisdictions — the role treats this as a hard differentiator
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically broad and capable senior individual contributor with real strengths in distributed systems and emerging AI tooling, but the profile does not approach the executive seniority, organizational leadership track record, or deep fintech-infrastructure expertise the CTO role requires — there is no demonstrated experience managing engineering teams, governing hybrid delivery models, communicating roadmaps to boards, or operating AI systems under financial regulatory constraints, making this a significant structural mismatch for the position.
